description: ConversationTracker eval — Chunk-in-context classification. Given a running conversation summary and a new chunk, classify as CONTINUATION, NEW_CONVERSATION, or FILLER.

cases.summary: Team is discussing the Q3 product roadmap. Sarah proposed moving the notification redesign to Q4. Mike disagreed, saying customers have been complaining. They decided to keep it in Q3 but reduce scope.
cases.chunk: And for the analytics dashboard, I think we can reuse the charting library we already have instead of buying a new one.
cases.note: Continues product roadmap discussion with a related feature

cases.summary: Team is discussing the Q3 product roadmap. Sarah proposed moving the notification redesign to Q4. Mike disagreed, saying customers have been complaining. They decided to keep it in Q3 but reduce scope.
cases.chunk: Oh by the way, did anyone submit their expense reports? Finance said they're due by Friday.

cases.summary: Team is discussing the Q3 product roadmap. Sarah proposed moving the notification redesign to Q4. Mike disagreed, saying customers have been complaining. They decided to keep it in Q3 but reduce scope.
cases.chunk: Yeah yeah, totally. Sounds good. Mmhmm.
cases.note: Pure agreement noise, no new info

cases.summary: Discussing the server migration from AWS to GCP. The team estimated it will take 6 weeks. John is handling the database migration and Lisa is doing the networking setup.
cases.chunk: We should also make sure to update the DNS records at least 48 hours before the cutover date.
cases.note: Directly related to server migration planning

cases.summary: Discussing the server migration from AWS to GCP. The team estimated it will take 6 weeks. John is handling the database migration and Lisa is doing the networking setup.
cases.chunk: So I got an email from HR about the new parental leave policy. It's pretty generous actually.
cases.note: HR policy is unrelated to server migration

cases.summary: Discussing the server migration from AWS to GCP. The team estimated it will take 6 weeks. John is handling the database migration and Lisa is doing the networking setup.
cases.chunk: Sorry what? The audio cut out for a second. Can you repeat that?

cases.summary: Planning the company holiday party. Budget is $5000. Venue options: rooftop bar downtown or the office cafeteria. Food will be catered. Date is December 15th.
cases.chunk: What about music? Should we hire a DJ or just make a Spotify playlist?

cases.summary: Planning the company holiday party. Budget is $5000. Venue options: rooftop bar downtown or the office cafeteria. Food will be catered. Date is December 15th.

cases.summary: Planning the company holiday party. Budget is $5000. Venue options: rooftop bar downtown or the office cafeteria. Food will be catered. Date is December 15th.
cases.chunk: Ha ha, oh man. That would be hilarious. Can you imagine?

cases.summary: Reviewing the quarterly sales numbers. Revenue is up 15% but margins are down 3%. The enterprise segment grew fastest. SMB churn is a concern at 8%.
cases.chunk: If we look at the enterprise pipeline, there are three deals over $500K that should close this month.

cases.summary: Reviewing the quarterly sales numbers. Revenue is up 15% but margins are down 3%. The enterprise segment grew fastest. SMB churn is a concern at 8%.
cases.chunk: Has anyone talked to the building management about the elevator being broken?

cases.summary: Reviewing the quarterly sales numbers. Revenue is up 15% but margins are down 3%. The enterprise segment grew fastest. SMB churn is a concern at 8%.
cases.chunk: Right, right. Yeah. Makes sense. Okay.

cases.summary: Discussing a patient's treatment plan. Patient is 67 years old with Type 2 diabetes and hypertension. Current medications: metformin 1000mg, lisinopril 20mg. A1C is 7.8, goal is under 7.
cases.chunk: I think we should add a GLP-1 agonist. The recent trials show significant A1C reduction in combination with metformin.

cases.summary: Discussing a patient's treatment plan. Patient is 67 years old with Type 2 diabetes and hypertension. Current medications: metformin 1000mg, lisinopril 20mg. A1C is 7.8, goal is under 7.
cases.chunk: Oh, the new scheduling software is terrible. It takes forever to book an appointment now.
cases.note: Administrative complaint unrelated to patient care

cases.summary: Talking about renovating the kitchen. They want to replace the countertops with quartz, update the backsplash, and add an island. Budget is around $25K. Contractor is coming next Tuesday for a quote.
cases.chunk: Should we also look at replacing the faucet while we're at it? The current one has been leaking.

cases.summary: Talking about renovating the kitchen. They want to replace the countertops with quartz, update the backsplash, and add an island. Budget is around $25K. Contractor is coming next Tuesday for a quote.
cases.chunk: I need to call the school about Emma's field trip permission slip. It's due tomorrow.

cases.summary: Discussing the new hire onboarding process. Issues with the current system: too many forms, no clear mentor assignment, laptop setup takes 3 days. Want to create a streamlined 1-day process.
cases.chunk: What if we pre-configure the laptops so they're ready on day one? IT could image them the week before.

cases.summary: Discussing the new hire onboarding process. Issues with the current system: too many forms, no clear mentor assignment, laptop setup takes 3 days. Want to create a streamlined 1-day process.
cases.chunk: Actually, I wanted to talk about the marketing campaign for the new product launch.

cases.summary: Discussing the new hire onboarding process. Issues with the current system: too many forms, no clear mentor assignment, laptop setup takes 3 days. Want to create a streamlined 1-day process.
cases.chunk: Hold on, let me grab some water. Be right back.

cases.summary: Planning a road trip from LA to San Francisco. Route options: Pacific Coast Highway vs I-5. Planning to stop in Santa Barbara for lunch. Total drive time about 6 hours via PCH.
cases.chunk: We should probably book a hotel in Big Sur for the night. It's too long to do in one stretch if we're taking the coast route.

cases.summary: Planning a road trip from LA to San Francisco. Route options: Pacific Coast Highway vs I-5. Planning to stop in Santa Barbara for lunch. Total drive time about 6 hours via PCH.
cases.chunk: Hey did you see the Warriors game last night? Steph Curry went off.

cases.summary: Planning a road trip from LA to San Francisco. Route options: Pacific Coast Highway vs I-5. Planning to stop in Santa Barbara for lunch. Total drive time about 6 hours via PCH.
cases.chunk: Uh huh, yeah, sure, whatever you think.

cases.summary: Debugging a production issue with the payment processing system. Stripe webhooks are failing with 500 errors. Started happening after yesterday's deploy. Affects about 10% of transactions.
cases.chunk: Wait, I think I found it. The webhook handler is trying to access a field that was renamed in the schema migration.
cases.note: Root cause discovery for the same bug

cases.summary: Debugging a production issue with the payment processing system. Stripe webhooks are failing with 500 errors. Started happening after yesterday's deploy. Affects about 10% of transactions.
cases.chunk: Can we talk about the team offsite? I need to book the venue by end of week.

cases.summary: Debugging a production issue with the payment processing system. Stripe webhooks are failing with 500 errors. Started happening after yesterday's deploy. Affects about 10% of transactions.
cases.chunk: Hmm, let me think. One sec.

cases.summary: Negotiating a lease renewal for the office space. Current rate is $45/sqft. Landlord wants $52/sqft. Team thinks $48 is fair. Lease expires in 90 days.
cases.chunk: What if we offer to sign a 3-year term instead of 2? That might give us leverage to get the rate down.

cases.summary: Negotiating a lease renewal for the office space. Current rate is $45/sqft. Landlord wants $52/sqft. Team thinks $48 is fair. Lease expires in 90 days.
cases.chunk: Oh I meant to ask, who's handling the social media posts for the product launch?

cases.summary: Discussing options for the company retreat. Last year was in Lake Tahoe. Considering Colorado, Hawaii, or a local resort. Budget is $500 per person. Need to finalize by end of month.
cases.chunk: I checked and the resort in Aspen has availability for our dates. It's $420 per person all-inclusive.

cases.summary: Discussing options for the company retreat. Last year was in Lake Tahoe. Considering Colorado, Hawaii, or a local resort. Budget is $500 per person. Need to finalize by end of month.

cases.summary: Reviewing a candidate's interview performance. Candidate had strong technical skills but seemed nervous. Solved the system design problem well. Concerns about communication skills and culture fit.
cases.chunk: Her references all said she's great in a team setting. Maybe the nervousness was just interview jitters.

cases.summary: Reviewing a candidate's interview performance. Candidate had strong technical skills but seemed nervous. Solved the system design problem well. Concerns about communication skills and culture fit.

cases.summary: Talking about setting up a home security system. Looking at Ring vs SimpliSafe vs ADT. Need cameras for front door, back yard, and garage. Want professional monitoring.
cases.chunk: SimpliSafe's monthly plan is only $15 and includes monitoring. Ring is $20 but has better cameras.

cases.summary: Talking about setting up a home security system. Looking at Ring vs SimpliSafe vs ADT. Need cameras for front door, back yard, and garage. Want professional monitoring.
cases.chunk: We need to figure out carpooling for the kids' soccer practice. It's every Tuesday and Thursday.

cases.summary: Discussing the annual budget allocation for the engineering department. Last year was $2.1M. Requesting $2.5M this year to cover 3 new hires and infrastructure costs.
cases.chunk: If we break it down, salaries account for 70%, infrastructure 20%, and tools 10%.

cases.chunk: I'll handle the cake. Does he prefer chocolate or vanilla? I think he mentioned chocolate last time.

cases.summary: Discussion about switching the company's health insurance provider. Current provider BlueCross has been raising premiums. Aetna and United are alternatives. Open enrollment is in November.
cases.chunk: United actually has a better dental plan included. That might offset the slightly higher premium.

cases.summary: Discussion about switching the company's health insurance provider. Current provider BlueCross has been raising premiums. Aetna and United are alternatives. Open enrollment is in November.
cases.chunk: Can someone close the window? It's getting really loud outside.

cases.summary: Reviewing the architecture for the new microservices migration. Moving from monolith to event-driven architecture. Using Kafka for message bus. Target completion Q2.
cases.chunk: For the user service, I think we should use PostgreSQL instead of MongoDB. The data is highly relational.
cases.note: Database choice for same architecture project

cases.summary: Reviewing the architecture for the new microservices migration. Moving from monolith to event-driven architecture. Using Kafka for message bus. Target completion Q2.

cases.summary: Talking about the performance review process. Current system uses 1-5 ratings which feel arbitrary. Considering switching to a narrative-based approach with clear expectations.
cases.chunk: Google used to do stack ranking and abandoned it. I think the narrative approach is more motivating for the team.
